originalTitle: Weight-loss treatments boom as Kenyan attitudes to beauty change
title: Weight-loss treatments boom as Kenyan attitudes to beauty change
content: Kenyan celebrities are driving a surge in weight‑loss and cosmetic procedures, sparking criticism and concerns.

originalTitle: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
content: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

originalTitle: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
title: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
content: Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.

originalTitle: Iran war threatens prolonged impact on energy markets as oil prices rise
title: Iran war threatens prolonged impact on energy markets as oil prices rise
content: The conflict has already led to the suspension of almost a fifth of global crude oil and natural gas supply.

originalTitle: Iran will not ‘bow’ to US and Israeli pressure, Pezeshkian says
title: Iran will not ‘bow’ to US and Israeli pressure, Pezeshkian says
content: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says Iran will not ‘bow’ to pressure from the United States and Israel.

originalTitle: Honouring Gaza’s women who refused to let the world look away
title: Honouring Gaza’s women who refused to let the world look away
content: Women journalists in Gaza have paid a heavy price for refusing to stay silent and continuing to expose Israel’s crimes.

originalTitle: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
title: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
content: Overnight, one Israeli operation saw at least 41 people killed and 40 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry.

originalTitle: War fuels debate in Cyprus over UK military bases
title: War fuels debate in Cyprus over UK military bases
content: “British Bases Out” is the slogan of Cypriot protesters after a drone strike targeted the RAF Akrotiri airbase.

originalTitle: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
title: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
content: Police say they are investigating other motives after the blast caused minor damage to the embassy building.

originalTitle: The anatomy of a corner-kick: how set-pieces reshaped the Premier League
title: The anatomy of a corner-kick: how set-pieces reshaped the Premier League
content: As corner kicks continue to cause chaos in the Premier League, BBC Sport take a closer at why they are becoming so hard to defend.

title: 'When you're with me, you're not bored' - Malard bringing sunshine to Man Utd
content: BBC Sport meets Manchester United and France forward Melvine Malard to discover her story.

originalTitle: 'A tough lesson' - Newcastle get  sobering reminder of gap to top
title: 'A tough lesson' - Newcastle get  sobering reminder of gap to top
content: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe admits his side were taught a tough lesson in their 3-1 FA Cup fifth-round defeat by Manchester City.
